## Verification

- [ ] I checked `docs/scope.md`
- [ ] I checked `docs/source-policy.md`
- [ ] I updated `verification.status`, `last_checked`, and `notes` where needed
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate-data`
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build-data` if raw data or aggregation changed
- [ ] I confirmed `git diff --exit-code -- data/site` after rebuilding, or explained the generated diff
- [ ] I did not commit `storage/**`, `dist/**`, or temporary outputs
